title: OptiCraft
description: OptiCraft aims to enhance the way you play Minecraft by optimizing Everything!
body:
## Deprication!
### Please use the new modpack [PVP Pack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/pvpp)

## Description
OptiCraft is a revolutionary Minecraft modpack designed to elevate your gaming experience by optimizing performance and introducing a curated selection of enhancements. Crafted with meticulous attention to detail, OptiCraft aims to make your Minecraft journey smoother, more visually appealing, and feature-rich.

## Features
- OptiCraft fine-tunes your game for optimal performance, ensuring a lag-free and responsive gaming environment.
- Immerse yourself in a visually stunning Minecraft world with improved graphics and updated textures.
- OptiCraft ensures that your game runs efficiently without sacrificing quality.
- Carefully selected mods are integrated to expand gameplay options without overwhelming the experience.

## Notes
- Part of the modpack uses features in [Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized) and [Simply Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sop) without these modpacks this wouldn't be made.
